name: codex-coordinator
description: Keep several Codex agents from duplicating work or losing handoffs on one large repository goal, with explicit delegation without Ultra.

interface.shortDescription: Keep parallel Codex tasks from crossing wires
interface.longDescription: Give Codex one large repository outcome without becoming the project manager for every agent. Coordinator divides the work, helps prevent duplicated effort and overlapping edits, remembers handoffs after pauses, and brings the project back into one clear update—with explicit delegation without Ultra.
defaultPrompt: Create the tasks needed and coordinate this goal: <goal>
Show who is working on what and what is blocked
Run Doctor across my enabled Coordinator projects
